betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Environmental pollution simulation. Industrial machines emit Carbon, Sulfur, and Dust that accumulate in chunks, causing debuffs and hazards. Manage your industrial footprint with chimneys, filters, and respirators.

Progression:
    The Three Pollutants - Understanding environmental hazards
    Cleanup Systems - Chimneys, vacuums, and pollutant pumps
    Personal Protection - Respirators and filter maintenance
